name: docchat-questions-v1
description: Fixed question set for the doc-chat workload. Each question is appended after a doc_{N}.txt cut via prompt_template. Written to be answerable from ANY prefix of the source (so the same set applies across the whole 2K..32K ladder). For TTFT experiments the content of the answer is secondary; the set is frozen so prompts are identical across compared runs.

questions.text: Summarize the text above in three sentences.
Who are the people named in the text above, and how are they related?
Where do the events described in the text above take place?
What is the tone or mood of the narrator in this passage?
What happens in the final paragraph of the text above?
